description: Daily Chinese calendar reference used to verify year/month/day pillars without introducing an hour oracle.

oracle.sourceNote: The Fourpillars.pro daily Chinese calendar page for 2000-01-07 lists Day/Month/Year as 甲子 / 丁丑 / 己卯. No hour pillar is published on that page.

description: Adjacent daily calendar reference to verify day-pillar advancement and confirm the same month/year frame.

oracle.sourceNote: The Fourpillars.pro daily Chinese calendar page for 2000-01-08 lists Day/Month/Year as 乙丑 / 丁丑 / 己卯. No hour pillar is published on that page.

description: Audit case held as a placeholder until a full four-pillar oracle with timezone-aware hour output is captured.

oracle.sourceNote: Needs an authoritative calculator or published chart that explicitly states timezone handling and hour pillar rules.
